description_long: This is a futuristic, voxel-style airplane with a predominantly white and gray color scheme accented by orange and black details. The fuselage is broad and tapers toward the nose, which features a dark, angular cockpit canopy with multiple window panels. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, each equipped with vertical winglets at the tips and additional control surfaces. The rear of the airplane has a distinctive tail section with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them. Four visible engine nacelles are integrated into the wings, two on each side, with orange intakes. The underside of the nose is detailed with a blue-tinted, faceted structure, possibly representing a sensor or observation dome.
description: A voxel-style, futuristic airplane with swept mid-wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a dark, angular cockpit canopy. The design features white, gray, and orange coloring with four visible engine nacelles and a blue-tinted nose dome.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, faceted blue-tinted nose dome, angular cockpit canopy, and the full span of the swept wings with vertical winglets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mid-mounted swept wing, engine nacelles, and the angular cockpit canopy with visible orange and black markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the symmetrical arrangement of the engines and wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wing, engine nacelles, and tail configuration, with clear visibility of the cockpit and fuselage markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips; moderate dihedral angle present.
attribute_engine_type: Four jet engines integrated into the wings, two per side.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers connected by a single horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; likely retractable landing gear based on design, but not explicitly shown.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-panel angular canopy and multiple window sections.
